title: 16 duplicate sub-subcategory groups fragment the taxonomy
environment: dev (http://localhost:5000) — prod re-run journaled for post-republish

fix.dataConsolidation: scripts/run19-dedupe-subsubcats.ts — groups sub-subcategory rows by normalized name (lowercase, strip non-alnum), picks canonical (bare slug > most per-node resources > lowest id), display name = most frequent exact name (FFMPEG x6 + FFmpeg x10 -> FFmpeg), re-points every group resource to the canonical triplet via PUT /api/admin/resources/:id (sequential, never Promise.all), temp-renames then deletes dup rows (delete guard counts by name globally), then normalizes surviving -scNNNN slugs to bare form when free. Idempotent; journaled.
recurrenceGuards: server/repositories/ensureSubSubcategory.ts — global case-insensitive name OR slug match anywhere in taxonomy -> no-op (tree builder folds the resource into its subcategory node, stays visible)
server/routes.ts POST /api/admin/sub-subcategories — same global check -> 409 with pointer to the existing row
fix.redirects: server/og-middleware.ts — /sub-subcategory/<slug>-scNNNN 301s to bare slug iff suffixed node no longer exists AND bare node exists; unknown suffixed slugs still soft-404
fix.caseVariantPass: scripts/run19-dedupe-subsubcats.ts final pass — scans the UNCACHED admin resources listing (all statuses) for subSubcategory strings that normalize-match a canonical row but differ in case/punctuation (FFMPEG->FFmpeg, iOStvOS->iOS/tvOS) and PUTs the canonical name; strings with no canonical match (Vendor Docs) are legitimately folded labels and left alone.

evidence.dedupeRun1: 16 groups consolidated: 210 resources re-pointed, 71 dup rows deleted (console log; journal overwritten by idempotency re-run)
evidence.idempotencyRerun: BUG-003/dedupe-dev-idempotent-rerun.json — before/after both 0 dup groups, no-op, PASS=true
evidence.slugNormalization: BUG-003/dedupe-dev.json — 6 surviving -scNNNN slugs renamed to bare (cdn-integration, chromecast, hdr-guidelines, origin-servers, rist, smart-tvs), 0 skipped, PASS=true

guardProbes.PUT resource 185648 subSubcategory 'FFMP: 200, row count stayed 26 (no new row), resource reverted (200)

caseVariantFixes.run1: 32 resource rows normalized (30 via tree scan + 2 rejected iOStvOS after switching scan to admin listing)
caseVariantFixes.sqlAfter: only 1 row remains: rejected 'Vendor Docs' (no canonical row — by design)

prodFollowUp: After republish: ADMIN_PASSWORD=<prod> npx tsx scripts/run19-dedupe-subsubcats.ts (writes BUG-003/dedupe-prod.json; prod baseline 106 rows / 18 groups)
status: VERIFIED (dev); prod data run pending republish
